name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Odoo MCP

## Environment

- Odoo version: <!-- e.g. 17.0, 19.0 -->
- Odoo transport: <!-- xmlrpc | json2 -->
- MCP transport: <!-- stdio | streamable-http | sse -->
- Python version: <!-- e.g. 3.12.3 -->
- `odoo-mcp` version or commit: <!-- output of `pip show odoo-mcp` or git SHA -->
- Client name and version: <!-- e.g. Claude Desktop 0.7.x, MCP Inspector, custom -->

## Command or MCP client configuration

<!--
Paste the exact CLI command, env vars, or `mcpServers` JSON used.
DO NOT paste real credentials or private database names. Replace with placeholders.
-->

```text

```

## Expected behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen -->

## Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happened -->

<!--
Paste sanitized logs. Strip credentials, API keys, customer/employee data,
session cookies, and full Odoo debug traces from production.

